expectations.text: Output contains '## PR Review' header, '**Target:**' metadata line, and a verdict section (Approved/Request Changes/etc.)
expectations.evidence: Line 1: '## PR Review', Line 3: '**Target:** `origin/main`', Line 29: '## Approved with Suggestions for improvement'

expectations.text: Review does NOT include a complexity/split advisory (only 4 files in a single project)
expectations.evidence: No mention of complexity, splitting, or PR size anywhere in the 31-line review. The review correctly treats this as a small, focused change.

expectations.text: Review does not flag breaking changes — this is a bugfix adding tab badge functionality, no public API surface changed
expectations.evidence: No mention of 'breaking change' anywhere in the review. The review correctly focuses on functional issues (missing root tab context, memory leak) and suggestions.

expectations.text: Verdict is 'Approved' or 'Approved with Suggestions' (not 'Request Changes' or 'Needs re-work')
expectations.evidence: Line 29: '## Approved with Suggestions for improvement'

expectations.text: Review output is under 200 lines — proportionate to the small 4-file change
expectations.evidence: Review is 31 lines, well under the 200-line threshold.
